text:
お帰りなさい！　って、えっ！？
何なの、その大荷物は！？

ええっ、倒してきたエネミーの素材を
飾りに使うの！？　貴方、凄いこと
思いつくね！　でも、いいかも！

クォーツとかトサカとかタテガミとか
これなら、子供たちもびっくりだよ！
早速、みんなで飾り付けを始めるね！

なんだか、貴方に感謝するお祭みたいに
なっちゃったけど……ありがとう！
イベント、絶対成功さ

Welcome back! ...Oh, what?
What is that large package you've got with you?

We can use materials from the
enemies you defeated as
decorations?! You really do come
up with some amazing ideas!

The children will surely be surprised by the
Quartz, crest, and mane! I'll get started on
the decorations at once!

This is quickly becoming the Thanks to You
Festival! To show my appreciation, I'll be sure
to make the event a roaring success!
